description:
This 16-question quiz tests Bash scripting skills across variables, loops, conditionals, string manipulation, functions, and syntax gotchas. It ranges from basic to tricky difficulty and uses an encouraging, slightly humorous tone to help learners sharpen or prove their shell scripting abilities.
Topics: variables, loops, conditionals, string manipulation, functions, syntax gotchas
Audience: Developers and system administrators with intermediate Bash knowledge
